basicInfo.name: Nightmare Lu Bu
basicInfo.flavor: Word of Lu Bu's skill spread far and wide, and he sparred with generals before the Emperor, but never once was he defeated. Impressed, the Emperor declared him unrivaled and ordered him to guard the canyon.

Normal Attack.desc:
2 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Bloody Whirlwind
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - Deals damage equal to 50% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Deals additional damage equal to 2000% of Physical Attack against targets inflicted with [Stun].
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 50% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Crimson Gale's Advance
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - Deals damage equal to 10% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Deals additional damage equal to 5000% of Physical Attack against targets inflicted with [Stun].
 - Activates again up to 1 time(s) with 100% power upon defeating an enemy with this skill.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 10% of Physical Attack.

profile.story:
Lu Bu is an unparalleled warrior of Aisha whose skill and combat prowess is unmatched even among the other Four Lords.
He joined Pascal's command as a common soldier near the end of the War of Destruction, and quickly distinguished himself by stealing an enemy horse in the thick of battle and breaking through enemy lines to behead the enemy commander.
Impressed by his valor, Pascal summoned him to the Imperial Palace to award him an official title.
However, several generals protested, pointing out his rough character and brutish nature as proof of his unworthiness of being commander. Lu Bu challenged them all to a duel in response and defeated them all, demonstrating his overwhelming strength.
In the end, his dissenters had no choice but to acknowledge his formidable power. Thus, Lu Bu rose from the rank of a common soldier to a general, and he became one of the Four Lords soon after.
Though his background as an orphan who clawed his way to the top was inspiring to the masses, the frequent problems caused by his selfishness and impulsivity earned him little favor from the public.
However, ever since he met Diaochan and started trying to become a better man for her, he has been slowly winning back the hearts of the people.
He has the absolute trust and respect of his soldiers because he leads and fights alongside them at the front lines rather than giving orders from the rear.
However, when passion and tempers run high, he has the tendency to blindly charge into battle, often leading to the annihilation of his men even when he himself returns alive.
In recognition of his awesome strength, he was bestowed the title "Peerless" by the Emperor.
